body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #191A21 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#191A21, color-mix(in srgb, #191A21 65%, transparent))

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.background: rgb(30, 31, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(25, 26, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
